{{Quote|I'm the one who can control ''fire--'' like so!|Fire|<ref name="DYKWYCA" />}}
'''Fire''' was one of the four [[Android/Legends|android]] creations of [[the Keeper]]. He had the ability to manipulate fire.

==Biography==
{{Quote|And yet... even a machine can know ''loneliness.'' Thus, the Keeper created four android ''helpers...'' in the image of its ''own'' creators.|The Keeper's vision|<ref name="TKS" />}}
[[The Keeper]] was left by her [[Keeper's makers|makers]] on the [[Keeper's World]] to restore it after it was devastated in an [[Unidentified war|ancient war]]. To assist with this task, and to fend of her loneliness, the Keeper created four nameless [[Android/Legends|android]] helpers. One of these was an android in [[Gender/Legends|male]] form who could control fire, both creating and manipulating it.<ref name="TKS" />

During the [[Battle of The Keeper's World]] the androids sided with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] against a squad of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]].<ref name="DYKWYCA" /> During the battle Fire created a wall of flame with a mere gesture, frightening the Stormtroopers who had invaded the [[Keeper's Temple]]. He then led the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] to meet the Keeper herself.<ref name="COM">{{StoryCite|story=Caverns of Mystery!|book=Pizzazz 7}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Never mind who ''we'' are! Who are ''you''?|Fire|<ref name="DYKWYCA" />}}
Fire had the appearance of a [[Human/Legends|human]] male with red hair that seemed to change in length and body like a flame. He was not immediately identifiable as a droid, save for his [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]], which looked like a yellow light shining from black eye sockets.

Fire spoke the most of Keeper's android creations, and frequently took the role of leader. He was aware of the Galactic Empire, and had a distaste for Imperial Stormtroopers, to the point of being the first of the four androids to attack the Stormtroopers. He was loyal to the Keeper, but was willing to rely on his own judgment, overriding the Keeper's desire to be unknown when he felt the cause was worthy enough.<ref name="DYKWYCA" />

==Skills and abilities==
{{Quote|W-what--?! The ''boy!'' With just a ''gesture''... he's creating a wall of ''flame''!|Stormtrooper|<ref name="COM" />}}
Through some unknown means Fire had complete mastery over his namesake element. He was able to both create fire at will, and also manipulate it as he wished, whether in ribbons of beautiful flame or as a wall of burning fire.<ref name="DYKWYCA" /><ref name="COM" />
